summary: Edit Lead Dialog Enhancement VERIFIED: Both Pre-Sales and Sales Edit Lead dialogs now show ALL fields matching the Add New Lead dialog. Tested: Name, Source dropdown (6 options), Email, Phone, Address, City, State, Pincode, Notes, and Custom Fields section (Budget Range dropdown with 5 options, Project Type dropdown, Square Feet number input, Expected Timeline dropdown, Requirements textarea). Save functionality works correctly.

test_credentials.Pre-Sales: Demo Access -> Quick Access -> 'Pre-Sales' button (Karthik Reddy)
test_credentials.Sales: Demo Access -> Quick Access -> 'Sales' button (Divya Pillai)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit Lead dialog enhancement verified. Both Pre-Sales (CRMPreSales.jsx) and Sales (CRMSales.jsx) Edit Lead dialogs now include all fields: Name, Source dropdown, Email, Phone, Address, City, State, Pincode, Notes, and Custom Fields section. Custom fields include: Budget Range (dropdown), Project Type (dropdown), Square Feet (number), Expected Timeline (dropdown), Requirements (textarea). The dialogs are scrollable and all fields are accessible. Save functionality works correctly with success toast.

Pre-Sales Edit Lead Dialog - Scrollable.details: Dialog has max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto, all fields accessible via scrolling

Pre-Sales Edit Lead Dialog - Source Drop.details: Source dropdown shows 6 options: Meta, SEO, Referral, Walk-in, Website, Other

Pre-Sales Edit Lead Dialog - Custom Fiel.details: Custom Fields section present with: Budget Range (dropdown), Project Type (dropdown), Square Feet (number), Expected Timeline (dropdown), Requirements (textarea)

Pre-Sales Edit Lead Dialog - Budget Rang.details: Budget Range dropdown shows 5 options: Under 50L, 50L - 1Cr, 1Cr - 2Cr, 2Cr - 5Cr, Above 5Cr

Pre-Sales Edit Lead Dialog - Save Functi.details: Changed source to SEO and saved - 'Lead updated successfully' toast appeared

Sales Edit Lead Dialog - All Fields Pres.details: Edit Lead dialog shows: Name, Source (dropdown), Email, Phone, Address, City, State, Pincode, Notes, and Custom Fields section

Sales Edit Lead Dialog - Scrollable.details: Dialog has max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto, all fields accessible via scrolling
